cards.front: What happens when you use the -d option with wildcards in the ls command?
cards.back: Displays only the file names, without their contents or permissions

cards.front: What is the effect of using the * wildcard in the ls command without options?
cards.back: Displays all files in the directory

cards.front: How does using the ? wildcard affect the ls command?
cards.back: Matches only one character in the file name

cards.front: What occurs when you use the -F option with wildcards in the ls command?
cards.back: Prefixes the file names with a special character, indicating their type

cards.front: What happens when you use the /** option with wildcards in the ls command?
cards.back: Displays all files in the specified directory and its subdirectories
